name: Trading Strategy Adaptive Learning
description: Trading-specific adaptive learning: walk-forward parameter optimization, A/B testing for strategy variants, failure clustering and root cause analysis, auto-tuning risk parameters from live results, and Bayesian optimization for indicator thresholds.
prompt: Trading-specific adaptive learning: walk-forward parameter optimization, A/B testing for strategy variants, failure clustering and root cause analysis, auto-tuning risk parameters from live results, and Bayesian optimization for indicator thresholds. Complements the general evolution-engine with crypto-trading-specific learning.
